data.body:
[Blue Archive Fall Celebration!]

Sensei! For those of you Starting Fall with Blue Archive, Hikari and Nozomi have prepared a special gift! 🍂

Log in every day to receive AP rewards, and don’t miss this golden chance to earn 2x account EXP too!

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3163008

#BlueArchive
